request: Rank Audi R8 models from 2007 till 2025
title: RANKING AUDI R8 MODELS
close_narration: So, which R8 would you park in your garage: V8, V10, GT, or V10 Plus?
order_rationale: Ordered from the original V8 model to the high-performance V10 Plus, showcasing the evolution of the R8's power and exclusivity.

entries.name: V8
entries.label: THE ORIGINAL
entries.one_line_fact: Debuting in 2007 at $109,000, the R8 V8's 420 horsepower and mid-engine layout made it a game-changer, blending supercar performance with daily drivability.

entries.name: V10
entries.label: POWER BOOST
entries.one_line_fact: In 2009, the R8 V10 hit the scene at $146,000, packing 525 horsepower and a 5.2-liter engine, elevating the R8's performance to new heights.

entries.name: GT
entries.label: LIMITED EDITION
entries.one_line_fact: Then came the 2011 R8 GT, a $196,800 limited edition with 560 horsepower, shedding weight and adding aero tweaks for track-focused enthusiasts.

entries.name: V10 Plus
entries.label: TOP PERFORMER
entries.one_line_fact: At number one, the 2013 R8 V10 Plus, starting at $174,795, delivered 550 horsepower, carbon-ceramic brakes, and a 0-60 time under 3.5 seconds.
